message:
perf(core): convert in_transaction from RefCell<bool> to Cell<bool>

in_transaction is checked on every prepared INSERT (bd-pktso fast path
guard) and throughout transaction management. Cell::get() is ~1ns vs
RefCell::borrow() ~5ns.

36 usage sites converted. All simple get/set patterns on a Copy type.
Saves ~4ns per INSERT row from the bd-pktso fast path alone, plus
savings throughout transaction begin/commit/rollback paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
